channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Ninepoint Partners Launching Expanded Suite of Single-Stock ETFs
item.description: New TSX listings include leveraged ETFs on NVIDIA, Tesla and Celestica, plus leveraged and non-leveraged ETFs for Constellation SoftwareTORONTO, April 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Ninepoint Partners LP, one of Canada’s leading independent investment managers, is pleased to announce the launch of ...

item.title: Is the SpaceX IPO Destined to Flop? This Historical Indicator Has a (Thus Far) 100% Success Rate and Offers a Clear Answer.
item.description: One time-tested valuation tool has a knack for forecasting directional moves in public companies on the leading edge of game-changing technologies.

item.title: Palantir Billionaire Peter Thiel Sells 2 Trillion-Dollar AI Stocks, but Wall Street Says It's Time to Buy
item.description: Billionaire entrepreneur Peter Thiel sold his hedge fund's stakes in Tesla and Microsoft during the fourth quarter.

item.title: Tesla’s FSD Is Finally Approved In Europe. Only In The Netherlands Though.
item.description: submitted by /u/Saurta17 [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla launches 200mph Model S “Gold” Signature in invite-only purchase
item.description: Tesla has announced a super limited Signature Edition run of 250 Model S Plaid and 100 Model X Plaid units as an invite only purchase in a bid to give its original flagship vehicles a proper send-off. When the Model S first launched in 2012, the first 1,000 units sold were “Signature” editions th...

item.title: Cybercab (with driver) spotted at OKC supercharger!

item.title: Prediction: Down 30%, Tesla Stock Is Still Not a Buy Ahead of Its Earnings Later This Month
item.description: Tesla's stock declines may just be the beginning.

item.title: Tesla could crash 60%, JPMorgan warns with 'high caution' — but betting against the 'Musk premium' has burned investors
item.description: JPMorgan analyst just dropped one of the most bearish calls on Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) shares.

item.title: Tesla's Big Rig Could Be a Big Success and Still Disappoint
item.description: Tesla's Semi might be off to a slow start, all things considered, but it's changing minds and has real potential to disrupt an industry.

item.title: SpaceX to land in your 401(k) no matter what. Michael Burry flags retirement savings are 'exit liquidity' for insiders
item.description: A new rule could leave regular investors holding the bag.

item.title: Fsd name changed on older Model 3.
item.description: seems they changed the wording on my Model 3 2020 to no longer say FSD.... wonder why I wonder to prevent Model 3 older owners from complaining when they don't deliver fsd. submitted by /u/IrishDan32 [link] [comments]

item.title: Trump's Tariff Turmoil Topples Ultra-Rich's Wealth — $174B Wiped Out From Fortunes Of World's Top 10 Billionaires, Including Elon Musk, Warren Buffett And Mark Zuckerberg
item.description: The 10 wealthiest individuals in the world, including Elon Musk, CEO of Tesla Inc., have lost $174 billion following President Donald Trump‘s tariff announcement on April 2. On a year-to-date basis, they lost nearly a staggering $350 billion. What Happened: Following Trump’s tariff declaration la...

item.title: Tesla Q1 Preview: It's About To Be Story Time On Wall Street
Here's the Real Reason SpaceX Is Teaming Up With Intel on Terafab
item.description: An Intel blog post highlighted exciting technology SpaceX may need to use.

item.title: Tesla’s FSD Is Finally Approved In Europe. Only Not Everywhere Yet
item.description: The Dutch approval is a milestone for Tesla, but expanding beyond a single market will require more regulatory wins.

item.title: Is SpaceX Really Worth More Than Tesla? Here's the Unvarnished Truth.
item.description: Ultimately, value (like beauty) lies in the eyes of the beholder.

item.title: Tesla’s Compact SUV Plan Tests Balance Between Volume Growth And Autonomy
item.description: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) is reported to be reviving plans for a smaller, more affordable electric SUV aimed at the mass market. The model is expected to allow both driverless and human-driven options, with initial production reportedly considered for China and later other regions. This effort follow...

item.title: Tesla FSD in Europe vs. US: It’s not what you think
item.description: On April 10, 2026, the Dutch vehicle authority RDW granted Tesla the first European type approval for Full Self-Driving Supervised, making the Netherlands the first country on the continent to authorize Tesla’s semi-autonomous system for customer use on public roads. As Teslarati reported , the R...

item.title: SpaceX Advances Texas Chip Plant, Eyes Production By End Of 2026: Report
item.description: SpaceX has reportedly initiated equipment installation at its advanced chip packaging facility in Bastrop, Texas. The company aims to begin production by the end of 2026, Reuters reported on Friday, citing sources. The aerospace giant is moving to bring semiconductor processes in-house.

item.title: The Secret to Out-Innovating the Competition: Inside the Tesla Playbook
item.description: Former Tesla President Jon McNeill discusses his new book, The Algorithm: The Hypergrowth Formula That Transformed Tesla, Lululemon, General Motors, and SpaceX.

item.title: Ross Gerber Thinks Tesla's Rumored Affordable Model Is Cybercab With A Steering: 'They'll Say Anything…'
item.description: Investor Ross Gerber of Gerber Kawasaki thinks that Tesla’s rumored affordable model would be a Cybercab fit with driver inputs. A Cybercab With A Steering Wheel In a post on X on Thursday, Gerber quoted a report by Reuters that shed light on a possible affordable vehicle being developed by the E...

item.title: The 30% Dip in Tesla Rippled Across EV Stocks. These 2 Stocks Are Worth Catching.
item.description: Tesla stock is down big since its December highs.

item.title: Tesla’s troublesome Auto Wipers get a major upgrade
item.description: One of Tesla’s most complained-about features is that of the Auto Wipers, but they have recently received a major upgrade that impacts every vehicle in the company’s fleet, a company executive confirmed. Tesla has quietly deployed a major over-the-air (OTA) update across its entire fleet, impleme...

item.title: Tesla doing final ‘Signature Series’ run of Model S and X Plaid — starts at $159,420
item.description: Tesla is producing a final limited-edition “Signature Series” run of the Plaid Model S and Model X — 350 vehicles total — as a farewell to its flagship programs before they shut down for good. The Model X Signature starts at $159,420. The invite-only program, which is being offered exclusively vi...

item.title: Gary Black Says Tesla's 8-Week Slide Driven By 'Disappointing' Deliveries, Robotaxi Doubts: 'EVs Still Comprise 70%...'
item.description: Investor Gary Black, who is a managing partner at The Future Fund LLC, has outlined his take on why Tesla, Inc. has been declining for the past eight weeks. Disappointing Deliveries On Thursday, the investor shared why he thought TSLA stock was on the decline in a post on the social media platfor...

item.title: Prediction: A Cheaper EV Could Be a Game Changer for Tesla's Business
item.description: The company hasn't said its last word.

item.title: Tesla Roadster unveiling set for this month: what to expect
item.description: The Tesla Roadster has been the ultimate carrot on a stick since its 2017 unveiling. Promised as the fastest production car ever made, with 0-60 mph in under two seconds and a top speed over 250 mph, it has endured years of delays. As Tesla finally edges toward production and an updated reveal, e...

item.title: Anthony Scaramucci Says He Owns SpaceX Stock And Won't Miss Out On The IPO Despite Elon Musk's 'Cult Of Personality' Premium
item.description: Anthony Scaramucci said Thursday he plans to invest in SpaceX's upcoming initial public offering even while acknowledging that Elon Musk's personal following inflates the company's valuation beyond what traditional measures would justify. Scaramucci Sees Premium But Still Buys In a post on X, the...

item.title: Is It Too Late to Buy Tesla Stock?
item.description: After a monster trailing-10-year return of nearly 2,000%, investors are wondering if they missed the boat.

item.title: Tesla: From Bye-Bye To Buy-Buy (Rating Upgrade)
Tesla Cabin Camera gets an incredible new feature for added driver safety
item.description: Tesla’s interior Cabin-facing Camera just got a brand new feature that is an incredible addition, as it provides yet another layer of added safety. The company quietly expanded the capabilities of its in-cabin camera with the rollout of Software Update 2026.8.6. Tesla hacker greentheonly revealed...

item.title: Tesla’s U.S. Sales Tanked In Q1. It Still Gained Market Share
item.description: As the EV market contracts, Tesla is cleaning up even with falling sales.

item.title: Tesla Stock Investors Just Got Good News From Wall Street Analysts About Robotaxis
item.description: Analysts at Bank of America and Morgan Stanley recently provided constructive outlooks for Tesla's autonomous driving business.

item.title: 5 lessons from hypergrowth companies like Tesla and Lululemon
item.description: For speed, you need a system that keeps decisions and progress on a short leash.

item.title: Tesla’s Semi truck factory is open with a detail that changes everything
item.description: Nearly nine years after Elon Musk unveiled the Tesla Semi in November 2017, the company is now opening a dedicated factory just outside of Reno, Nevada, and ramping toward mass production of 50,000 trucks per year. Volume production began in March 2026 at the new Tesla Semi factory, with the comp...

item.title: Tesla stock shaky after new model denial
item.description: Well, that didn't take long. Tesla China denied a report this week that said the electric vehicle company is developing a new, smaller SUV model to be produced at its Shanghai factory. Tesla China says "market information claiming that Tesla is developing a new, smaller, and cheaper electric SUV ...

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving gets first-ever European approval
item.description: Tesla Full Self-Driving (Supervised) got its first-ever European approval, as the Netherlands gave the suite the green light to begin operation. Tesla owners in the Netherlands with a Full Self-Driving subscription will receive a software update “shortly,” the company said, activating the operati...

item.title: Elon Musk’s Top Tips That Will Save Retirees From Financial Disaster
item.description: While it's doubtful that Tesla CEO Elon Musk -- the world's richest person by a long shot, as Forbes detailed -- will have to worry too much about a comfortable retirement plan, he nonetheless can be...

item.title: Tesla FSD is approved in the Netherlanfs
item.description: submitted by /u/Illustrious_Net_3359 [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla gets FSD Supervised approved in the Netherlands — here’s what it means
item.description: The Dutch vehicle authority RDW has granted Tesla a type approval for its “Full Self-Driving” Supervised system in the Netherlands, marking the first European country to officially approve the driver-assist technology. The approval, which falls under the UN R-171 regulation for Driver Control Ass...

item.title: Stocks making big moves this week: Richardson Electronics, Tesla, C.H. Robinson Worldwide, IPG Photonics, and Zscaler
item.description: Check out the companies making headlines this week:

item.title: Ross Gerber Demands $10K Refund If Tesla's New FSD Doesn't Work 'Unsupervised'—Says Google Has 'Solved' Autonomy With Waymo
item.description: Investor Ross Gerber of Gerber Kawasaki said on Wednesday that Tesla Inc. should initiate refunds for customers if the latest version of its Full Self-Driving (FSD) system does not work as intended. $10K Refunds In a post on the social media platform X, Gerber weighed in on Tesla’s FSD v14.3 update.

item.title: Tesla's supervised self-driving software gets Dutch okay, first in Europe
item.description: Dutch regulators approved the use of Tesla's driver assistance software which handles most driving ‌tasks on highways and city streets under human supervision, in the first regulatory sign‑off ‌for the technology in Europe. Approval from the Netherlands' RDW for the technology, called Full Self‑D...

item.title: Cathie Wood Doubles Down On Tesla Amid 60% Downside Warning: Ark Adds Another $11.4 Million Worth Of TSLA Stock
item.description: Ark Invest, led by Cathie Wood, executed a significant trade on Thursday by purchasing shares of Tesla Inc.. This move comes amid mixed analyst opinions and market volatility surrounding the electric vehicle giant. The Tesla Trade ARK Innovation ETF acquired 33,210 shares of the Elon Musk-led com...

item.title: Tesla stock is on track for 8-week losing streak: What to know
item.description: Tesla stock (TSLA) may appear to have gained nearly 38% over the last year, but the EV stock has still fallen over 20% in 2026 year-to-date and is set for an eight-week losing streak. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian discerns whether there are possible catalysts for investors ...

item.title: Podcast: Tesla’s cheaper EV model comes and goes, FSD v15, Rivian R2 EPA numbers, and more
item.description: In the Electrek Podcast , we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss Tesla’s cheaper EV model coming and going in the same week, FSD v15, Rivian R2 EPA numbers, and more. more…

item.title: Vanda Research Says Retail Investors are Buying the Tesla Stock Dip. Should you?
item.description: Tesla stock is down in 2026 and retail investors are piling in. But with missed delivery targets and a JPMorgan "Sell" rating, is buying the dip actually smart?

item.title: Elon Musk Says Tesla Model S, Model X Inventory Nearly Over—YouTuber JerryRigEverything Calls It 'Going Out Of Business' Sale
item.description: Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk urged customers wanting to get their hands on the outgoing Model S and Model X vehicles to place their orders, citing limited inventory. Inventory Nearly Over Musk, in a post on the social media platform X on Wednesday, shared that there were only a “few hundred Tesla Mod...

item.title: Tesla: Car Company Aspiring High-Tech, But Stock Performance Confirms Neither
Tesla is using a redesigned Cybertruck battery cell to mitigate Semi challenges
item.description: Tesla revealed that it is utilizing redesigned Cybertruck battery cells in its Long Range Semi to mitigate some pertinent challenges that come with long-haul logistics. It is perhaps the most recent example of Tesla using unique engineering prowess and cross-pollinating vehicle elements to solve ...
